sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75040" key="o)rqri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθρ-ία</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὥρα</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n75040.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">morning</tr_>: prop. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄρθριος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
